name: @intentsolutionsio/brand-strategy-framework
description: A 7-part brand strategy framework for building comprehensive brand foundations - the same methodology top agencies use with Fortune 500 clients.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install brand-strategy-framework\\n  or /plugin install brand-strategy-framework@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
